creator: hadara@bsd.ee
text:
Kdebase 2.2.2 build lets you get away with using old version of kdelibs 
in my case kdelibs-2.2_3 (from package), and of course it will not compile against this version of libraries

Fix: 

probably it would help if kdelibs 2.2.2 were in the BUILD_DEPENDS list of the
kdebase 2.2.2 port
How-To-Repeat: install kdelibs 2.2_3 and try to build kdebase 2.2.2 port
